---
title: "Pipelines Reprodutiveis (sus_rap_*)"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: false
    theme: flatly
    self_contained: true
---

```{css, echo=FALSE}
:root {
  --cf-bg-page: #F1F8E9;
  --cf-card-bg: #FFFFFF;
  --cf-primary: #2E7D32;
  --cf-secondary: #558B2F;
  --cf-accent: #EF6C00;
  --cf-text-main: #1B5E20;
  --cf-text-light: #52665A;
  --cf-shadow: 0 10px 30px -10px rgba(46, 125, 50, 0.15);
}
.tutorial-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(300px, 1fr));
  gap: 2rem;
  padding: 2rem 0;
  font-family: 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif;
}
.tutorial-card {
  background: var(--cf-card-bg);
  border-radius: 12px;
  padding: 2rem;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  border: 1px solid rgba(46, 125, 50, 0.1);
  border-left: 5px solid var(--cf-primary);
  box-shadow: var(--cf-shadow);
  transition: all 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.25, 0.8, 0.25, 1);
  position: relative;
  overflow: hidden;
}
.tutorial-card:hover {
  transform: translateY(-6px);
  box-shadow: 0 15px 35px -10px rgba(46, 125, 50, 0.25);
  border-color: var(--cf-secondary);
}
.card-header {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: space-between;
  align-items: flex-start;
  margin-bottom: 1.2rem;
}
.card-icon {
  color: var(--cf-secondary);
  background-color: #E8F5E9;
  padding: 10px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
}
.card-badge {
  background-color: var(--cf-bg-page);
  color: var(--cf-primary);
  font-size: 0.7rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: 0.5px;
  padding: 4px 10px;
  border-radius: 20px;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  border: 1px solid rgba(46, 125, 50, 0.2);
}
.card-title {
  color: var(--cf-text-main);
  font-size: 1.35rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  margin: 0 0 0.75rem 0;
  line-height: 1.2;
}
.card-description {
  color: var(--cf-text-light);
  font-size: 0.95rem;
  line-height: 1.6;
  flex-grow: 1;
  margin-bottom: 2rem;
}
.card-cta-button {
  background-color: var(--cf-primary);
  color: white !important;
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  text-align: center;
  text-decoration: none;
  padding: 12px 20px;
  border-radius: 8px;
  transition: background-color 0.2s ease, transform 0.2s ease;
  align-self: flex-start;
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 8px;
}
.card-cta-button:hover {
  background-color: var(--cf-secondary);
  text-decoration: none;
  transform: translateX(4px);
}
.tutorial-card svg { width: 24px; height: 24px; }
.card-cta-button.is-soon {
  background-color: #C8D6C0;
  color: #52665A !important;
  cursor: not-allowed;
  pointer-events: none;
}
.card-cta-button.is-soon:hover { background-color: #C8D6C0; transform: none; }
.card-badge.is-step { background-color: var(--cf-accent); color: #FFFFFF; border-color: var(--cf-accent); }
.card-badge.is-model { background-color: #1565C0; color: #FFFFFF; border-color: #1565C0; }
.card-badge.is-rap { background-color: #6A1B9A; color: #FFFFFF; border-color: #6A1B9A; }
.section-intro { color: var(--cf-text-light); font-size: 1rem; line-height: 1.6; max-width: 760px; }
.section-card {
  background: var(--cf-card-bg);
  border-radius: 16px;
  padding: 2rem;
  border: 1px solid rgba(46, 125, 50, 0.15);
  border-left: 6px solid var(--cf-primary);
  box-shadow: var(--cf-shadow);
  transition: all 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.25, 0.8, 0.25, 1);
  cursor: pointer;
  text-decoration: none;
  display: block;
}
.section-card:hover { transform: translateY(-4px); box-shadow: 0 15px 35px -10px rgba(46, 125, 50, 0.25); text-decoration: none; }
.section-card h3 { margin-top: 0; color: var(--cf-primary); font-size: 1.4rem; font-weight: 700; }
.section-card p { color: var(--cf-text-light); font-size: 0.95rem; line-height: 1.6; margin-bottom: 1.5rem; }
.section-count {
  display: inline-block;
  background: var(--cf-primary);
  color: #fff;
  font-size: 0.72rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  padding: 3px 12px;
  border-radius: 20px;
  margin-bottom: 0.75rem;
  letter-spacing: 0.5px;
}
.section-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(300px, 1fr));
  gap: 2rem;
  padding: 2rem 0;
  font-family: 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif;
}
.section-cta {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 6px;
  background-color: var(--cf-primary);
  color: white !important;
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  padding: 10px 18px;
  border-radius: 8px;
  text-decoration: none;
  transition: background-color 0.2s ease;
}
.section-cta:hover { background-color: var(--cf-secondary); text-decoration: none; }
```

```{r setup, eval=FALSE}
```

```{=html}
<p><a href="https://bymaxanjos.github.io/climasus4r/pt/articles/tutorials.html">← Voltar para Tutoriais</a></p>

<p class="section-intro">Crie, compartilhe e reexecute analises de saude-clima como Reproducible Analytical Pipelines (RAPs). Os tutoriais abaixo cobrem exportacao de pipelines, integracao com o targets e ferramentas de compartilhamento — do script reprodutivel ao scaffolding completo de projeto com renv, Quarto e GitHub Actions.</p>

<table>
<thead><tr><th>RAP</th><th>Titulo</th><th>Funcoes Principais</th></tr></thead>
<tbody>
<tr><td>1</td><td>Exportar e Executar RAPs</td><td>sus_rap_export(), sus_rap_read(), sus_rap_run()</td></tr>
<tr><td>2</td><td>Pipelines com targets</td><td>sus_rap_targets(), sus_rap_make()</td></tr>
<tr><td>3</td><td>Compartilhar e Scaffolding</td><td>sus_rap_share(), sus_rap_template()</td></tr>
</tbody>
</table>

<div class="tutorial-grid">

  <div class="tutorial-card">
    <div class="card-header">
      <div class="card-icon">
        <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M4 16v1a3 3 0 003 3h10a3 3 0 003-3v-1m-4-8l-4-4m0 0L8 8m4-4v12"/></svg>
      </div>
      <span class="card-badge is-rap">RAP 1</span>
    </div>
    <h3 class="card-title">Exportar e Executar RAPs</h3>
    <p class="card-description">Converta qualquer pipeline climasus4r em artefato reprodutivel (script, RMarkdown, Quarto ou funcao). Leia de volta, inspecione, reexecute com novos parametros e atualize o arquivo em disco. Cobre sus_rap_export(), sus_rap_read(), sus_rap_run().</p>
    <a href="https://bymaxanjos.github.io/climasus4r/pt/articles/rap-01-exportar-executar.html" class="card-cta-button">Ver Tutorial →</a>
  </div>

  <div class="tutorial-card">
    <div class="card-header">
      <div class="card-icon">
        <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M9 3H5a2 2 0 00-2 2v4m6-6h10a2 2 0 012 2v4M9 3v18m0 0h10a2 2 0 002-2V9M9 21H5a2 2 0 01-2-2V9m0 0h18"/></svg>
      </div>
      <span class="card-badge is-rap">RAP 2</span>
    </div>
    <h3 class="card-title">Pipelines com <code>targets</code></h3>
    <p class="card-description">Gere um _targets.R com cache inteligente e paralelismo dinamico por UF, ano ou produto cartesiano. Execute e monitore via sus_rap_targets() e sus_rap_make(). Ideal para analises multi-estado.</p>
    <a href="https://bymaxanjos.github.io/climasus4r/pt/articles/rap-02-targets.html" class="card-cta-button">Ver Tutorial →</a>
  </div>

  <div class="tutorial-card">
    <div class="card-header">
      <div class="card-icon">
        <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M3 7v10a2 2 0 002 2h14a2 2 0 002-2V9a2 2 0 00-2-2h-6l-2-2H5a2 2 0 00-2 2z"/></svg>
      </div>
      <span class="card-badge is-rap">RAP 3</span>
    </div>
    <h3 class="card-title">Compartilhar e Scaffolding</h3>
    <p class="card-description">Exporte uma receita YAML compacta, importe pipelines de colegas, use a GUI Shiny para editar sem codigo e crie projetos completos com renv + targets + Quarto em uma linha com sus_rap_template().</p>
    <a href="https://bymaxanjos.github.io/climasus4r/pt/articles/rap-03-compartilhar.html" class="card-cta-button">Ver Tutorial →</a>
  </div>

</div>

<p><a href="https://bymaxanjos.github.io/climasus4r/pt/articles/tutorials.html">← Voltar para Tutoriais</a></p>

<a href='https://github.com/ByMaxAnjos/climasus4r/issues/new'>
  <button type="button" class="btn" style="background-color: #3BB273; color: white; padding: 10px 20px; font-size: 14px; font-weight: bold; border: none; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer;">
    Abrir uma issue no GitHub
  </button>
</a>
```
